original_image_tags: An orange manila file folder with a black hole reinforcement at the top center. A handwritten number is written in the top right corner. Two black hole reinforcements are visible at the bottom edge.

elements.description: Back of an orange manila folder. It has three punch holes (one top center, two bottom). There is a handwritten alphanumeric sequence in the top right corner: '62-83894-242' (the first part in blue pencil, the last three digits in red pencil). No other visual elements are present.

judge.reason: One description quotes specific alphanumeric text ('62-83894-242') inside an image while the other does not, indicating a hallucination by one side.
